div.p:
text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance
before and during convoy insertion."
Id="REQ-1.1"

textPath.tspan: text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance
text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance
text="The joining truck shall maintain a minimum safe distance

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 202px; height: 139px; padding-top: 238px; margin-left: 702px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; width: 200px; height: 139px; overflow: hidden;

div.p:
text="A V2V wireless link with bounded communication latency shall be initiated before the joining truck enters the convoy."
Id="REQ-1.2"

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; width: 200px; height: 159px; overflow: hidden;

div.p:
text="The system shall only permit platoon coupling when the relevant operational and safety conditions are satisfied."
Id="REQ-1.4."

textPath.tspan: text="The system shall only permit platoon coupling when the relevant operational and safety conditions are satisfied."
text="The system shall only permit platoon coupling when the relevant operational and safety conditions are satisfied."

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 145px; height: 198px; padding-top: 218px; margin-left: 2200px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; width: 143px; height: 198px; overflow: hidden;

div.p:
text="Existing follower trucks shall be notified by the lead truck of an incoming join event before it occurs."
Id="REQ-1.5."

textPath.tspan: text="Existing follower trucks shall be notified by the lead truck of an incoming join event before it occurs."
text="Existing follower trucks shall be notified by the lead truck of an incoming join event before it occurs."

text="Speed synchronization shall be performed using a 50 Hz update cycle before the joining truck enters the active platoon state."
Id="REQ-1.3.2.1."

textPath.tspan: text="Speed synchronization shall be performed using a 50 Hz update cycle before the joining truck enters the active platoon state."
text="Speed synchronization shall be performed using a 50 Hz update cycle before the joining truck enters the active platoon state."

div.p: text="The speed deviation between the joining truck and the platoon shall remain within the defined synchronization tolerance before coupling is completed."

text="Speed, position, and braking data shall be exchanged between trucks at a minimum rate of 50 Hz."
Id="REQ-1.2.2"

text="A V2V wireless link (latency not exceeding 20 ms) shall be initiated before the joining truck enters the convoy."
Id="REQ-1.2.1"
